Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course focuses on the EU's legal framework and institutional structure as a '超國家組織', promoting the rule of law and effective institutions (Target 16.3, 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course analyzes the EU as a major regional partnership, its role in global trade (WTO, FTAs), and international relations, directly aligning with global partnerships and policy coherence.
